# Notte — Browser Platform for AI Agents
# https://notte.cc | https://docs.notte.cc

## Documentation Pages

- /docs — Overview: what Notte is, core capabilities (sessions, agents, scraping), quick code example
- /docs/quickstart — Step-by-step setup: create account, set NOTTE_API_KEY, install SDK, run first session, try web agent
- /docs/sessions — Browser sessions via CDP: connect_over_cdp() pattern, Session() params (idle_timeout_minutes, max_duration_minutes), lifecycle, anti-detection
- /docs/agents — Web agents: client.Agent() + agent.run(task=, url=) with kwargs (not positional string), max_steps config
- /docs/scraping — Structured extraction: client.scrape(url=, response_format=PydanticModel, instructions=), returns typed data
- /docs/troubleshooting — Error catalog: NOTTE_API_KEY not set, CDP -32601, session timeouts, wrong param names, agent.run() TypeError
- /docs/api-reference — Full SDK reference: NotteClient, Session(), Agent(), scrape() with complete parameter tables, types, defaults, return types

## Quick Start

```bash
pip install notte-sdk playwright
export NOTTE_API_KEY=your-key
```

```python
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright
from notte_sdk import NotteClient

client = NotteClient()

with client.Session() as session:
    cdp_url = session.cdp_url()
    with sync_playwright() as p:
        browser = p.chromium.connect_over_cdp(cdp_url)
        page = browser.contexts[0].pages[0]
        page.goto("https://example.com")
        print(page.title())
```

## Key Details

- SDK: `pip install notte-sdk` (Python >= 3.11) or `npm install notte-sdk`
- Auth: `NOTTE_API_KEY` environment variable
- Console: https://console.notte.cc
- Timeout params: `idle_timeout_minutes`, `max_duration_minutes`
- agent.run() signature: `agent.run(task="...", url="...")`
